sentence_reviews.text: Formal methods express desired behavior as mathematical specifications and use proof, model checking, abstract interpretation, or certificates to establish correctness claims.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: arXiv:2104.02466 abstract lines 37-41; AIMA contents.html lines 182-193 and 261-262
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited formal-methods survey directly supports rigorous correctness guarantees, abstract interpretation, SMT/optimization/abstract-interpretation verification methods, soundness/precision/scalability limitations, and formal verification. AIMA supports theorem proving and model checking. Certificates are not directly supported by the inspected abstract.

sentence_reviews.text: They distinguish behavior that has merely been sampled in tests from behavior proven under explicit assumptions.
sentence_reviews.notes: The survey supports formal methods providing rigorous correctness guarantees and discusses soundness, precision, and scalability. The contrast with sampled tests is a reasonable synthesis, not directly stated in the inspected abstract.

edge_reviews.notes: Formal methods rely on logic, proofs, theorem proving, and model checking. Core strength is defensible.
The formal-methods paper is in programming languages and concerns verification of software/ML systems. Core strength is defensible for specifications and proof obligations over software artifacts.
Verification methods are algorithmic, and the paper mentions SMT, optimization, and abstract interpretation techniques. Common strength is defensible.
